name: @affectively/gnosis
description: Ink-based TUI REPL for the gnosis functional logic-based programming language

scripts.check:formal: bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint betti.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint transformer.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint ai_hello.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint example.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint topic_domain_transformer.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint warmup_cache_reuse.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint warmup_precompute_prefetch.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint warmup_adaptive_optimization.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint warmup_approximate_probabilistic.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint warmup_structural_amortized.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint warmup_physical_biological.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint warmup_human_social_entrainment.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint warmup_invert_cache_reuse.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint warmup_invert_precompute_prefetch.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint warmup_invert_adaptive_optimization.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint warmup_invert_approximate_probabilistic.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint warmup_invert_structural_amortized.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint warmup_invert_physical_biological.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint warmup_invert_human_social_entrainment.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint examples/benchmarks/fold-training-linear.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint examples/benchmarks/fold-training-winner-take-all.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js lint examples/benchmarks/fold-training-early-stop.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js test topic_domain_transformer.test.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js test warmup_taxonomy.test.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js test warmup_inversion.test.gg && bun ./bin/gnosis.js test examples/benchmarks/fold-training.test.gg
